description: You are preparing airfoil aerodynamic data for use in a Blade Element Momentum (BEM) turbine simulation. BEM analysis requires polar data covering the full 360-degree angle of attack range, but XFoil can only produce reliable data over a limited range. Using the NACA 6412 airfoil coordinate file at /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca6412.dat, perform an XFoil viscous analysis at Reynolds number 500,000 for angles of attack from -10 to 25 degrees. Extrapolate this polar to the full 360-degree range (-180 to +180 degrees) and export the resulting data to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca6412_360polar.txt. You are already logged in as user 'ga'.
